title: Request Construction, Method Semantics, Safety, and Idempotency · Go Client Systems · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A security reviewer reconstructing an expired incident handoff must reconstruct the governing policy from partial evidence after delay and distinguish current rules from tempting earlier ones for request construction, method semantics, safety, and idempotency, producing method-aware request builder. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a Go 1.26 net/http method-aware request builder after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pra…
objectives: Construct a request with an intentional method, target, fields, body, context, and caller-owned policy. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Distinguish safe and idempotent method semantics from what one particular server happens to do. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Use GET and HEAD with conditional, range, cache, and body expectations that preserve their defined semantics. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
